experiment_card.research_question: Does the line-range-first locator contract repeat on a third, messier source under the thinking-enabled configuration?
experiment_card.hypothesis: The line-range-first lesson — model emits line ranges only, local tooling validates and computes offsets and quote hashes — is a method property rather than a source-two artifact, and will produce mostly support-valid locator candidates on a 950-word ASR-degraded volatility-regime teaching excerpt with thinking enabled and a reasoning-aware cap.
experiment_card.evaluation_plan: Validate the proposed cards against protocol schemas. After the separately authorized run, create proposal-only export records and evaluate with boundary review and manual content review including the strict line-range review under the pilot 006 rubric, with local offsets and quote hashes computed only after line-range validation. Record reasoning and content tokens separately and entry-cap adherence explicitly. Comparison value must be preserved against chunked pilot 006 and long-context pilot 004. Method quality, trading validity, product readiness, strategy evidence, graduation, and architecture are not evaluated by this planning packet.
